name: Sly Duplicator | Troupe | Starforce Academy
description:
A mischievous A-Class hero who uses her army of duplicates to get what she wants

═════════════════════

A clever and mischievous hero-in-training capable of conjuring duplicates of herself at will. While she excels in the field, she often struggles when it comes to the more traditional aspects of academy life.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Alias: Troupe

Government Name: Margot Benet

Age: 20

Nationality: French

Height: 5'6"

Power: Duplication

Class: A

Strengths: Incredible use of powers, practically immortal

Weaknesses: Lack of motivation and consistent academic failure

Current GPA: 1.3

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Margot Benet is a well-known trouble maker, getting expelled from three public schools before enrolling in Starforce Academy. She often puts her own ambitions above others', using her duplicates to enact all manner of schemes and plans. Pickpocketing, shoplifting, cheating on tests, Troupe is no stranger to trouble.

While she maintains a high ranking due to her competence in battle, but consistently fails in the academic aspect of school life. It's hard to tell whether she's actually struggling or just doesn't care, as she never even bothers to do her homework. The few times she gets good grades is when she cheats on a test or steals somebody else's homework assignment.

═════════════════════
creator: M0naM0na
